note: Describes QloApps as an open-source hotel management and reservation system with PMS, booking engine, hotel website, and channel-manager capabilities.

note: Source repository for the free and open-source QloApps hotel booking platform.

note: Details guest booking management, real-time availability, dynamic rates, refunds, and booking-engine features relevant to direct hotel reservations.

title: OpenTripPlanner

note: Documents BTCPay Server as a free, open-source, self-hosted Bitcoin payment gateway with Lightning Network support.

title: NIP-15: Nostr Marketplace
note: Describes a Nostr marketplace protocol for decentralized merchant listings and Bitcoin or Lightning purchases.
